resume_en.summary: Senior Frontend Developer with 10+ years of experience building Angular applications with RxJS and Signals. Proven track record delivering customer-facing dashboards, component libraries, and design systems for remote, EU-based product teams. Strong TypeScript, performance optimization, and unit testing (Jest) background, fluent English.

cover_letter_en:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am writing to apply for the Senior Frontend Developer (Angular) position at Nordic Frontend Labs. Over the past 10 years I have built Angular applications with RxJS and Signals, most recently owning a shared component library used across three product teams.

I would welcome the opportunity to bring this experience to your remote, EU-based team.

Best regards,
Ihar Petrasheuski
cover_letter_pl:
Szanowni Państwo,

Z przyjemnością aplikuję na stanowisko Starszego Programisty Frontend (Angular) w Nordic Frontend Labs. Przez ostatnie 10 lat budowałem aplikacje Angular z wykorzystaniem RxJS i Signals.

Z poważaniem,
Ihar Petrasheuski
about_me_en: Senior Frontend Developer with 10+ years of Angular experience, specializing in RxJS, Signals, and component library design for remote EU product teams.
about_me_pl: Starszy programista Frontend z ponad 10-letnim doświadczeniem w Angular, specjalizujący się w RxJS i Signals dla zdalnych zespołów produktowych w UE.
